scope_note: QA Directrix Divisibility cert. Certifies the structural reduction directrix_distance_integer iff e divides d*d*d iff e divides b*b*b for d=b+e, plus the prime-exponent classifier kernel3(e)=product p^ceil(v_p(e)/3), where the condition holds exactly when kernel3(e) divides b. Empirical QA-orbit lift is preserved as context only, not part of the theorem statement.
